mapper.select:
SELECT d.STAFF_ID AS staffId, e.DEPT_ID AS deptId, e.NAME AS name, e.PHONE AS phone, e.EMAIL AS email, e.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, e.GENDER_CODE AS genderCode, e.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, e.ADDRESS1 AS address1, e.ADDRESS2 AS address2, e.STATUS AS status,
d.LICENSE_NO AS licenseNo, d.DOCTOR_TYPE AS doctorType, d.SPECIALTY_ID AS specialtyId, d.PROFILE_SUMMARY AS profileSummary, d.DOCTOR_FILE_URL AS doctorFileUrl, d.EDUCATION AS education, d.CAREER_DETAIL AS careerDetail, d.EXT_NO AS extNo
FROM JCH.EMPLOYEE_DOCTOR d JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE e ON e.STAFF_ID = d.STAFF_ID

SELECT d.STAFF_ID AS staffId, e.DEPT_ID AS deptId, e.NAME AS name, e.PHONE AS phone, e.EMAIL AS email, e.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, e.GENDER_CODE AS genderCode, e.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, e.ADDRESS1 AS address1, e.ADDRESS2 AS address2, e.STATUS AS status, d.LICENSE_NO AS licenseNo, d.DOCTOR_TYPE AS doctorType, d.SPECIALTY_ID AS specialtyId, d.PROFILE_SUMMARY AS profileSummary, d.DOCTOR_FILE_URL AS doctorFileUrl, d.EDUCATION AS education, d.CAREER_DETAIL AS careerDetail, d.EXT_NO AS extNo FROM JCH.EMPLOYEE_DOCTOR d JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE e ON e.STAFF_ID = d.STAFF_ID
e.NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
d.SPECIALTY_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
d.STAFF_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
e.DEPT_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
d.EXT_NO LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
( e.NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR d.SPECIALTY_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR d.STAFF_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR e.DEPT_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR d.EXT_NO LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
ORDER BY d.STAFF_ID DESC
